transcript.text:
[Today's meal is a little special]
It looks a little strange
Chewy It's like eel meat
[What can this be...?]
The neck meat is the best part
[Chicken Neck Meat]
Insane
Now I see why they say the neck is the best
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jangan-dong
I'm here for chicken neck meat
My friend recommended me this place And said it was really good
I couldn't eat here yesterday because of the wait And it was too crowded
So I'm here in the afternoon to avoid the peak hours
Is it popular these days? Chicken neck meat is not common at all
[Gyepodong] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]

Hello
[Amazed to see Tzuyang]
I came when you guys weren't busy
It's my first time seeing a celebrity
There's the menu
There's a lot Even sides
What's chicken neck meat?
It's the meat on the back of the neck
Then I'll get 2 orders of spicy and 2 orders of salted chicken ribs
Also 3 orders of spicy and 3 orders of salted chicken neck meat
So that's 10
Mozzarella cheese fondue,
And also scorched rice soup, please
I used to watch her a lot
But the business got busy these days
Chicken thigh meat is tender, but neck meat is chewy Almost like an eel

I love that
It's going to be great
10 servings weigh 2.5kgs
Tzuyang can do it
[Here it comes]
[Stew is here too]
That's cool
This is the neck meat, and that's the ribs
Looks very unusual
I heard that the neck meat is always the best
I think I heard that from somewhere
Salted ones first
For how long do I need to cook them?
It already comes out moderately cooked
So you can eat it when they turn a little brown
The bottom part is very thick, so be mindful

Just cook until the pink is gone
Eating it cooked just right is the best
They look very strange It's like a tadpole
The head and the tail
Thank you
[Can't go wrong with cheese fondue]
Some soft tofu soup
Looks delicious The colors are amazing
Let's cut it to see if it's ready
It's cooked! Let's try it
Bon appetit
Without anything first
What is this?
It's like chicken cartilages
It's really good The texture...
Let's try it with the dipping sauce

Amazing texture
Let's taste it again
I need more
With this sauce
And napa cabbage
Amazing
It's really like cartilages
It's tender but when you bite into it It's not like chicken
Meaty and crunchy
It's not something you're used to
It's good with the sauces too
Some wasabi on top
It's so good
You have to try it for yourself
Soft and chewy?
Now I know why they say the neck meat is the best

It's hot
Tasty
Let's try the ribs
A little seasoned
All at once
Take them out like this
Cut it
The texture of the neck meat is the best
Some ssamjang on top (soybean seasoning paste)
How's this possible?
It's burning
Can you please help me?
I think it's burning
It's like pork ribs
We make it like this using thigh meat
I was wondering what kind of business I should do And realized that there aren't many chicken rib restaurants

So I got to try a lot of them first
Probably every chicken rib restaurant in Seoul
I recommend eating it with the sauce as a lettuce wrap
-I checked just now and I'm still subscribed -Really?
[The owner is her subscriber!]
Thank you
-Will you do big bites? -Definitely
The visuals are crazy
Looks delicious
Which one is more popular?
The ribs
But those who enjoy the neck meat only eat neck meat
I came for the neck meat
But these look great too
That's so good
The meat and the juice melt in my mouth

This is great
Lettuce wrap like this
1 piece of garlic
Salad
This is insane
Great smokey flavors too
It's so good
This would be great with cheese too
That goes really well together
[Grill change]
Thank you
This is no joke
The seasoned one this time
I love this part of the meat over dry meat
It's so juicy and tender
Wrap

Seriously So good
Pickled radish is great too
[Drinks on the house]
Thank you so much
I got plum juice
This will go so well
Oh no!
I burnt it a little bit
You can't be distracted when grilling seasoned meat
Can't let it burn
Let's try the seasoned neck meat
If you like the consistency of pork jowl You will love this one
I'm falling in love
It's not tough or hard to chew
It's really chewy
With cheese fondue

The seasoning and the cheese combination...
Incredible
A lot of people think about the famous chicken stir-fry
But I haven't had too much of that
That really brings back old memories
This meat is crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside
Melted cheese
Get some cheese on here
I feel like I can do 20 servings here
I prefer the salted neck meat
The seasoning might be a little too overwhelming
You can solely enjoy the flavors of the neck meat this way
I guess this is the reason why it's so popular these days
Put it on top
Dip
The texture is amazing

It's like a mushroom, a stringray, or a fish bone...
Like a spinal cord
Is it because it's back here?
Salted ribs
Seasoned is better for the ribs
Personal preference
Let's grill it like how he did it
This looks great too
A little bit of salt
Really tasty
It doesn't have a gamey taste at all
The salted ones are better
You can taste the original meat
But this all depends on your preference
So good
Salt is enough But I'll try other sauces too

Spicy fried chicken?
Into a lettuce wrap
Goes well with perilla leaf
Seasoned neck meat
3kgs of these won't even fill me up

That's what I like to believe I won't die

Now that I think about it This is neck
My mom would love these
She loves neck meat
Let's come here
I'm going to ask her again which part she likes

I forgot about this

So hot Let's cool it down a bit
1, 2, 3
[3 seconds]
The cheese fondue is a must!
Amazing
[3 seconds to cool down again]
Last plate of the salted neck meat
It's so good
The cheese It's not melted anymore
Do the best you can
Eating this with cabbage was really good
I made a mess
It's not filling me up at all
This is all that's left
It's not like I ate little
I can eat endlessly when the food is good

it's so good that I don't get tired of it
I just had hot pot before this I'll have some porridge when I get home
The friend that recommended this place lives around here
She said she's a regular here And I didn't tell her I was going to come here today
I stole her spot
She might get mad later when I tell her
"Why did you go?!"
The texture...
If grilled chicken tastes this good, I will have a hard time picking which part to eat
This is one of the best places
And I don't even like chicken that much
The juicier it is, the better it goes with wasabi
I have never thought of this combination before
It's all bones now
Tender

But this is chicken!
Right
I didn't think it would be this tender
It's like a drumstick
It just looked dry
A very smokey drumstick
Hot
She's so pretty
-Did you have a good meal? -Yes, it was so good
I want to eat more But I'll just come back next time
You finished everything? Thank you
[Clean plates]
Thank you, friend
What? That sonuds weird
Thanks!
